name: Neurosynth
simplification: Prototype values normalized into 0-1 activation signatures
limitations: Meta-analytic maps aggregate heterogeneous study contexts

name: Human Connectome Project
simplification: Connection weights converted into illustrative network edges
usageScope: Graph edge thickness and route suggestions
limitations: Illustrative graph is not participant-level reconstruction

name: OpenNeuro
dataType: Task fMRI and multimodal open datasets
simplification: Task contexts summarized for storytelling language
limitations: Task protocols differ widely across studies
